description: Build source-attributed vehicle safety dossiers, honest comparisons, and recall-change reports from NHTSA data.

novel_features.name: Safety dossier
novel_features.description: See identity, recall and complaint summaries, and available crash ratings in one source-attributed report; add --include-records for complete source records.

novel_features.name: Garage recall watch
novel_features.description: Report newly observed recall campaigns and remedy changes for saved vehicles.

novel_features.name: Defect signal timeline
novel_features.description: Place complaint and recall events on one normalized timeline and identify the official flat-file sources required for investigations and communications.

novel_features.name: Honest model comparison
novel_features.description: Compare two model years while keeping raw complaint counts and missing denominators explicit.

novel_features.name: Recall coverage reconciliation
novel_features.description: Decode one VIN, list matching model-level campaigns, and keep VIN eligibility and repair status explicitly unverified with a link to NHTSA's official lookup.

novel_features.name: Complaint-to-bulletin bridge
novel_features.description: Show structured complaint and manufacturer-communication co-occurrence candidates.
